messages.speaker: system
messages.text: PART I

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: DUNGEON

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Murid Caravan — Before sunrise

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rain clouds hang far beyond the Felidian border.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Nox.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Come here.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rizo spreads an old map across a wooden crate.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: I found the entrance.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: The Crescent Jade is somewhere beneath these ruins.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: The treasure every caravan has been searching for.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: You are the only one small enough to enter without disturbing the old passages.

choices.label: want me to go first
choices.text: You want me to go first.

choices.label: found the Crescent Jade
choices.text: You found the Crescent Jade?

choices.label: expect me to enter alone
choices.text: You expect me to enter alone?

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: I found the route.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: The treasure itself is still waiting for us.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rizo taps three circles drawn beside a corridor.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Three circles mean safe.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Follow the marks, find the Jade, then come back.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: If I bring it back, no one will call me useless again.

choices.label: follow the map
choices.text: I will follow the map.

choices.label: inspect the map first
choices.text: I will inspect the map first.

choices.label: ask why no one else is coming
choices.text: I will ask why no one else is coming.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Alone?

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: You make it sound as though I am abandoning you.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: We will be waiting outside.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Once you confirm the path, we all go in together.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The other bandits avoid looking at Nox.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: No one has prepared a torch.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: No one has packed climbing rope.

choices.label: give me the map
choices.text: Then give me the map.

choices.label: send someone with me
choices.text: Then send someone with me.

choices.label: tell me what happened to the last scout
choices.text: Tell me what happened to the last scout.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rizo’s smile disappears for only a moment.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: There was no last scout.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Do not invent reasons to be afraid.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: I did not say I was afraid.

choices.label: understand
choices.text: I understand.

choices.label: do not believe you
choices.text: I do not believe you.

choices.label: will return with the treasure
choices.text: I will return with the treasure.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox turns the map toward the morning light.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Several arrows have been drawn with fresh black ink.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Older markings remain underneath.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Rizo covered something.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Beneath one arrow is a broken crescent symbol.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Another corridor has been scratched out completely.

choices.label: may show the safer route
choices.text: The old markings may show the safer route.

choices.label: are probably outdated
choices.text: The old markings are probably outdated.

choices.label: prove Rizo has been inside before
choices.text: The old markings prove Rizo has been inside before.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: You want another bandit to risk his life for you?

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Perhaps you are not ready to earn a full share.

messages.speaker: bandit
messages.text: Let the little mouse stay with the wagons.

messages.speaker: bandit
messages.text: We can find someone braver.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: If I refuse, I will never hear the end of it.

choices.label: will enter the dungeon
choices.text: I will enter the dungeon.

choices.label: am leaving the caravan
choices.text: I am leaving the caravan.

choices.label: only asked a question
choices.text: I only asked a question.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox leaves before sunrise.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: He never enters the Felidian ruins.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: He never finds the Crescent Jade.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: He never meets Luna.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Sometimes survival means walking away.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: But some stories begin only when walking away is no longer possible.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Felidian Ruins — Upper Dungeon

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The entrance closes behind Nox with a low stone groan.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Two stairways descend beneath the ruins.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The left stair is broad and completely dry.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The right stair is narrow and damp.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Rizo’s arrow points left.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A faint current of cool air rises from the right.

choices.label: the marked dry stair
choices.text: I will take the marked dry stair.

choices.label: the damp stair with moving air
choices.text: I will take the damp stair with moving air.

choices.label: time to inspect both routes
choices.text: I will take time to inspect both routes.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Dust covers the dry stair.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nothing has disturbed it recently.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Tiny pale moths rest near the damp passage.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Living creatures need air.

choices.label: moths may be following fresh air
choices.text: The moths may be following fresh air.

choices.label: untouched stair must be safer
choices.text: The untouched stair must be safer.

choices.label: map is more reliable than insects
choices.text: The map is more reliable than insects.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The dry stair leads to a long stone corridor.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: No wind moves through it.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: No insects crawl between the stones.

messages.speaker: rizo
messages.text: Three circles mean completely safe.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox raises his lantern.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The flame contracts into a small blue point.

choices.label: test the air before continuing
choices.text: I should test the air before continuing.

choices.label: move quickly before the flame dies
choices.text: I should move quickly before the flame dies.

choices.label: trust the three-circle mark
choices.text: I should trust the three-circle mark.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox lowers the lantern toward the floor.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The flame weakens further.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: It is not being blown out.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: It is suffocating.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Behind him, pale moths gather near a narrow crack in the wall.

choices.label: must be near fresh air
choices.text: The moths must be near fresh air.

choices.label: must be hiding treasure
choices.text: The moths must be hiding treasure.

choices.label: will not help me
choices.text: The moths will not help me.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox continues into the silent corridor.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: His lantern dies first.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Rizo said this route was safe.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: His knees strike the stone.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The corridor remains perfectly silent.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The narrow stair descends beside a wet limestone wall.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Pale moths flutter ahead of Nox.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: They gather wherever cool air enters through the cracks.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: They are showing me where the cave can breathe.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Far below, something metallic rings once.

messages.speaker: dungeon
messages.text: Ting.

choices.label: follow the moths
choices.text: I will follow the moths.

choices.label: leave them and follow Rizo’s arrow
choices.text: I will leave them and follow Rizo’s arrow.

choices.label: mark the airflow on the map
choices.text: I will mark the airflow on the map.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox compares the scratched-out route with the dungeon wall.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A broken crescent has been carved beside a narrow passage.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rizo’s fresh ink redirects travelers away from it.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: He did not make a mistake.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: He covered this route deliberately.

choices.label: wanted me to avoid this passage
choices.text: Rizo wanted me to avoid this passage.

choices.label: must have corrected an old error
choices.text: Rizo must have corrected an old error.

choices.label: has already explored the dungeon
choices.text: Rizo has already explored the dungeon.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A strip of red caravan cloth is caught between two stones.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: It bears the same knot used on Rizo’s supply bags.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Someone from the caravan came here before me.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: And Rizo told me there was no previous scout.

choices.label: remember that Rizo lied
choices.text: I should remember that Rizo lied.

choices.label: turn back and confront him
choices.text: I should turn back and confront him.

choices.label: assume the cloth is old
choices.text: I should assume the cloth is old.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox climbs back toward the entrance.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A slab of stone now blocks the upper stair.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Rizo!

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: No answer comes from outside.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: He sealed it after I entered.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Chamber of Bells

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Dozens of bronze bells hang from the ceiling.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Pale and dark tiles form a path across the floor.

messages.speaker: dungeon
messages.text: Ting.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: I did not touch anything.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A second bell moves above a dark tile.

choices.label: step between the pale tiles
choices.text: I will step between the pale tiles.

choices.label: walk directly beneath the bells
choices.text: I will walk directly beneath the bells.

choices.label: throw a stone onto the floor
choices.text: I will throw a stone onto the floor.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox throws a loose stone onto a dark tile.

messages.speaker: dungeon
messages.text: TING.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A blade sweeps through the air above it.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: The bell announces the trap.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Dust on the pale tiles remains undisturbed.

choices.label: pale tiles avoid the triggers
choices.text: The pale tiles avoid the triggers.

choices.label: dark tiles activate the bells
choices.text: The dark tiles activate the bells.

choices.label: shortest route is still best
choices.text: The shortest route is still best.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox steps beneath the largest bell.

messages.speaker: dungeon
messages.text: TING.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Something releases above him.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The bell strikes the floor hard enough to crack the stone.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox reaches the far side of the bell chamber.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: White mineral veins run through the limestone floor and walls.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The stone cracks softly beneath his boots.

messages.speaker: cave
messages.text: Crack.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: The white sections are weaker than the gray stone.

choices.label: cross without striking the stone
choices.text: I should cross without striking the stone.

choices.label: break the weak floor deliberately
choices.text: I should break the weak floor deliberately.

choices.label: test the wall with my hammer
choices.text: I should test the wall with my hammer.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox taps the white-veined wall.

messages.speaker: cave
messages.text: Crack.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A slab falls between him and the bell chamber.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: One careless blow could bring down the entire passage.

choices.label: move carefully forward
choices.text: I will move carefully forward.

choices.label: strike the floor again
choices.text: I will strike the floor again.

choices.label: try to reopen the blocked route
choices.text: I will try to reopen the blocked route.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox strikes the fractured wall.

messages.speaker: cave
messages.text: CRACK.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: White-veined limestone gives way around him.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rizo’s map remains beneath the rubble.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox strikes a thin white vein in the floor.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The stone breaks, revealing a narrow shaft below.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Cool air rises from darkness.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Water flows somewhere beneath the dungeon.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: An underground channel.

choices.label: follow the underground water
choices.text: I will follow the underground water.

choices.label: return to the upper corridor
choices.text: I will return to the upper corridor.

choices.label: search the shaft for treasure
choices.text: I will search the shaft for treasure.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A faded mural covers the next chamber.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Felidian priests stand beneath a crescent moon.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Between them kneels a young black cat girl.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Blue lines fall from the sky onto dry fields.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: A prayer for rain.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The girl holds no jewel.

choices.label: a girl being offered beneath the moon
choices.text: The mural shows a girl being offered beneath the moon.

choices.label: priests presenting a hidden treasure
choices.text: The mural shows priests presenting a hidden treasure.

choices.label: the location of the Crescent Jade
choices.text: The mural shows the location of the Crescent Jade.

messages.speaker: inscription
messages.text: WHEN THE MOON BECOMES A CLAW—

messages.speaker: inscription
messages.text: —THE CRESCENT JADE SHALL BE OFFERED.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The final word is written beside the painted girl.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Jade may not mean a stone.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Or perhaps the girl is carrying it somewhere I cannot see.

choices.label: may be the girl herself
choices.text: The Crescent Jade may be the girl herself.

choices.label: must be hidden behind the mural
choices.text: The Crescent Jade must be hidden behind the mural.

choices.label: is probably ceremonial jewelry
choices.text: The Crescent Jade is probably ceremonial jewelry.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A stone casket rests beneath the mural.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox opens it carefully.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: There are no gems inside.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Only a silver clasp and several strands of black fur.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: This was used for clothing.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Ceremonial clothing.

choices.label: examine the clasp
choices.text: I will examine the clasp.

choices.label: take the silver
choices.text: I will take the silver.

choices.label: leave the casket untouched
choices.text: I will leave the casket untouched.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The clasp is shaped like a crescent moon.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Its inner surface is lined with black fur.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: It was worn around someone’s neck.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Not used to hold a jewel.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A low altar stands beyond the mural chamber.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: It is too long to support a jewel.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Leather restraints hang from both sides.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A narrow channel leads away from its center.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: This altar was made for a person.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A soft bell rings beyond the next doorway.

choices.label: approach quietly
choices.text: I should approach quietly.

choices.label: call out for the treasure
choices.text: I should call out for the treasure.

choices.label: turn back immediately
choices.text: I should turn back immediately.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox enters a round chamber.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: An empty pedestal stands beneath an opening in the ceiling.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Crescent moonlight falls across its surface.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Empty.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Someone reached the treasure first.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A black tail disappears behind a pillar.

choices.label: search behind the pillar
choices.text: I will search behind the pillar.

choices.label: touch the crescent seal
choices.text: I will touch the crescent seal.

choices.label: demand that the thief come out
choices.text: I will demand that the thief come out.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox moves around the pillar.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A black Felidian girl sits on the floor.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A broken ceremonial clasp hangs from her neck.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Her yellow eyes remain fixed on him.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: You took your time.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: A Felidian.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: A cat.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Did Rizo send you?

choices.label: came looking for the Crescent Jade
choices.text: I came looking for the Crescent Jade.

choices.label: was sent here by Rizo
choices.text: I was sent here by Rizo.

choices.label: do not know anyone named Rizo
choices.text: I do not know anyone named Rizo.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Luna’s expression changes.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: The Crescent Jade.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Is that what he told you?

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: You know where it is.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Closer than you think.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Stone grinds somewhere above them.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: A treasure thief should not make demands.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Luna rises.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Her claws extend with a quiet metallic sound.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: She knows Rizo’s name.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: She was waiting for us.

choices.label: drop Rizo’s map
choices.text: I will drop Rizo’s map.

choices.label: run for the doorway
choices.text: I will run for the doorway.

choices.label: threaten her with my knife
choices.text: I will threaten her with my knife.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Rizo’s map lands between them.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Luna looks down at the fresh black arrows.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: He changed the route.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: You have seen this map before?

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: I have seen what happens to those who follow it.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The ceiling shudders.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Stay back.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: You entered my territory.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: You searched our altar.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: And now you point a knife at me?

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A deep crack travels through the chamber.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox presses the crescent seal.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A hidden mechanism moves beneath the pedestal.

messages.speaker: dungeon
messages.text: TING.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The ceiling opening begins to close.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Take your hand away.

choices.label: release the seal
choices.text: I will release the seal.

choices.label: force it open
choices.text: I will force it open.

choices.label: ask Luna what it controls
choices.text: I will ask Luna what it controls.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: What does it control?

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: The entrance.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: And now it is collapsing.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A roar travels through the upper dungeon.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox forces the seal downward.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The mechanism locks.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The stone ceiling closes around the pedestal.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Let go!

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The chamber becomes still.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The dungeon shakes.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Dust pours from the ceiling.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Somewhere above, the entrance collapses.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: Rizo!

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: No answer comes through the stone.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: He is not coming for you.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: You do not know that.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: I know exactly what he sent you to do.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: A second crack splits the chamber floor.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Move.

choices.label: follow Luna’s warning
choices.text: I will follow Luna’s warning.

choices.label: run away from her
choices.text: I will run away from her.

choices.label: stay and search for another exit
choices.text: I will stay and search for another exit.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The cracked floor gives way.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox falls into a sloping limestone passage.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Luna lands behind him.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Stop running.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: I am falling!

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: The passage throws them both into darkness.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: PART II

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: ESCAPE FROM LUNA

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Limestone Cave — Unknown depth

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox lands in a shallow underground stream.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Behind him, Luna rises silently from the water.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Little mouse.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: We are not finished.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: The entrance is gone.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: The cat is still here.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Somewhere ahead, pale moths flutter toward moving air.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: PART II

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: ESCAPE FROM LUNA

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Limestone Cave — Unknown depth

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Nox follows Luna into the underground passage.

messages.speaker: luna
messages.text: Stay close, little mouse.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: The entrance is gone.

messages.speaker: nox
messages.text: For now, Luna is the only guide I have.

messages.speaker: system
messages.text: Pale moths flutter ahead toward moving air.
